name: compute_portfolio_wacc
description: Computes the capital-weighted WACC across a portfolio of properties. Each property's WACC is weighted by its share of total portfolio capital.

input_schema.properties: Array of { name, equity, debt, cost_of_equity, cost_of_debt }
input_schema.tax_rate: Corporate tax rate as decimal (uniform across properties)

output_schema.portfolio_wacc: Capital-weighted average WACC across all properties
output_schema.total_equity: Sum of equity across all properties
output_schema.total_debt: Sum of debt across all properties
output_schema.property_details: Array of { name, wacc, equity_weight, debt_weight, capital_share }
